# OmniLearn Documentation

> Official documentation for OmniLearn, the open-source learning management system (LMS).

OmniLearn is an open-source platform for creating and delivering modern educational content. It features a Notion-like WYSIWYG editor, built-in AI assistants, multi-organizational support, real-time collaboration, progress tracking, and can be self-hosted or used via OmniLearn Cloud.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://docs.omnilearn.app/getting-started): Set up your first organization and course
  - [Quickstart](https://docs.omnilearn.app/getting-started/quickstart): Get up and running in minutes
  - [Key Concepts](https://docs.omnilearn.app/getting-started/key-concepts): Organizations, courses, chapters, activities, and trails
  - [Cloud vs Self Hosting](https://docs.omnilearn.app/getting-started/cloud-vs-self-hosting): Choose the right deployment model

- [Platform](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform): Complete guide to OmniLearn features
  - [Courses](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/courses): Creating and managing courses
    - [Chapters & Activities](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/courses/chapters-and-activities): Structuring course content
    - [Collections](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/courses/collections): Grouping courses together
    - [Trails](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/courses/trails): Student progression tracking
  - [Editor](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/editor): Block-based WYSIWYG content editor
    - [Blocks](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/editor/blocks): Available editor block types
  - [AI Features](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/ai): Built-in AI assistant
    - [For Students](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/ai/for-students): AI chat, explanations, quizzes
    - [For Teachers](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/ai/for-teachers): AI content generation tools
  - [Users](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/users): User management
    - [Roles & Permissions](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/users/roles-and-permissions): Admin, teacher, student roles
    - [Authentication](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/users/authentication): Login methods and OAuth
  - [Organizations](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/organizations): Multi-org management
    - [Settings](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/organizations/settings): Organization configuration
    - [Multi-Tenancy](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/organizations/multi-tenancy): Running multiple orgs
  - [Discussions](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/discussions): Discussion forums
    - [Comments](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/discussions/comments): Comment system
  - [Assignments](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/assignments): Student assignments
    - [Grading](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/assignments/grading): Grading system
  - [Playgrounds](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/playgrounds): Interactive code playgrounds
  - [Boards](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/boards): Kanban-style boards
  - [Analytics](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/analytics): Usage analytics
  - [Certifications](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/certifications): Course certifications
  - [Search](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/search): Full-text search
  - [Podcasts](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/podcasts): Podcast support
  - [Code Execution](https://docs.omnilearn.app/platform/code-execution): Sandboxed code execution

- [Self Hosting](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting): Deploy on your own infrastructure
  - [Installation](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/installation): Install via the OmniLearn CLI
    - [Requirements](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/installation/requirements): System requirements
    - [Quick Install](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/installation/quick-install): Step-by-step install guide
    - [CLI Reference](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/installation/cli-reference): All CLI commands
  - [Configuration](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/configuration): Configure your instance
    - [Environment Variables](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/configuration/environment-variables): All env vars
    - [SSL](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/configuration/ssl): HTTPS and SSL setup
    - [AI Setup](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/configuration/ai-setup): Configure AI providers
    - [Email](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/configuration/email): Email delivery setup
    - [Storage](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/configuration/storage): S3 and filesystem storage
  - [Maintenance](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/maintenance): Keep your instance healthy
    - [Backups](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/maintenance/backups): Database backups
    - [Updates](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/maintenance/updates): Updating OmniLearn
    - [Monitoring](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/maintenance/monitoring): Health checks and monitoring
    - [Troubleshooting](https://docs.omnilearn.app/self-hosting/maintenance/troubleshooting): Common issues

- [Developers](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers): Architecture, API, and contributing
  - [Architecture](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/architecture): System architecture
    - [Backend](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/architecture/backend): FastAPI backend
    - [Frontend](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/architecture/frontend): Next.js frontend
    - [Services](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/architecture/services): Supporting services
  - [API](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/api): REST API reference
    - [Authentication](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/api/authentication): JWT and API tokens
    - [Endpoints](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/api/endpoints): API endpoint reference
  - [Contributing](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/contributing): How to contribute
    - [Dev Environment](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/contributing/dev-environment): Development setup
    - [Guidelines](https://docs.omnilearn.app/developers/contributing/guidelines): Contribution guidelines

## Optional

- [Full documentation content](https://docs.omnilearn.app/llms-full.txt): Complete text of all documentation pages
